scripts.dev:
echo '
Start applications with commands:

  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/server run dev
  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/client run dev
  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/server-nestjs run dev

Make sure you provide env variables in `.env` files.'
scripts.docker:dev: docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --remove-orphans; docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.dev.yml watch --no-up & docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.dev.yml logs server client server-nestjs nginx-strangler -f
scripts.docker:e2e: docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up ${TAG:+--no-build} -d --remove-orphans; pnpm playwright:test; docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:integ: docker compose --env-file apps/server/.env.integ -f ./docker/docker-compose.integ.yml up -d; docker compose --env-file apps/server/.env.integ -f ./docker/docker-compose.integ.yml watch --no-up & docker compose --env-file apps/server/.env.integ -f ./docker/docker-compose.integ.yml logs server client server-nestjs nginx-strangler -f
scripts.docker:integ:build: env $(cat apps/server/.env.integ | grep -v '#' | xargs) COMPOSE_FILE=./docker/docker-compose.integ.yml docker buildx bake --allow=fs.read=.. --file ./docker/docker-compose.integ.yml --load
scripts.integ:
echo '
Start applications with commands:

  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/server run integ
  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/client run integ
  pnpm --filter @cpn-console/server-nestjs run integ

Make sure you provide env variables in `.env.integ` files.'
